title: Decorators, Cross-Cutting Behavior, and Transparent Wrappers · Changed-Stream Lab
summary: Add retries, timing, authorization checks, and telemetry without changing business function contracts. The scenario, data, constraints, and failure modes differ from the workshop. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of a transparent decorator stack with order tests with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Translate decorator syntax into explicit rebinding and predict application order.
Separate decorator configuration, function wrapping, and call execution across closure layers.
Preserve signatures, metadata, return values, exceptions, and async behavior through wrappers.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
